summary: First testing pass for Ranthambore's Curator. Backend: 21/21 pytest cases passed (bookings CRUD, inquiries for all 6 types, admin auth & PIN validation, stats, live-feed, status updates, unauthorized rejection). Frontend: Home/Hotels/Packages/Contact/SafariBooking flows all working. Admin login, overview stats, bookings list, inquiries filtering, live feed, and confirm-status action all verified end-to-end. Pricing math is correct: Gypsy Indian 3 guests + Chambal addon = ₹9,900.

issues: Footer phone numbers are placeholders (+91 99999 99999) — expected per problem statement but worth flagging to product.

action_items: Login-lockout-after-3-attempts behavior was not exercised in this run (it relies on client-side state); main agent can self-test by entering wrong PIN 3 times if regression needed.

Package modal flow: package-book-0 currently creates the inquiry directly without opening a modal — confirmed via live feed ('Package Booking — pending guest details'). Verify this matches intended UX (problem statement says 'creates a package inquiry' so this is acceptable).
Bookings/Inquiries rows lack data-testid on individual list rows (only action buttons like confirm-{ref} expose testids). Consider adding booking-row-{ref} / inquiry-row-{id} for future testability.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 250 lines, single-file structure is fine for MVP. _attempts dict declared but never used — dead code; lockout logic actually lives client-side per Admin.jsx.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded via projection {"_id": 0} on all list endpoints — good.
ADMIN_PIN read from env via os.environ.get('ADMIN_PIN', '73921846') — has hardcoded fallback; for production this should fail fast if missing.
All endpoints async, use motor — good. Pydantic validation on all inputs.
No rate limiting on /api/admin/login or public POST endpoints — acceptable for MVP but worth noting.
Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly via lib/api.js.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed bookings and inquiries during testing; cleaned up after run (3 bookings + 10 inquiries removed via mongosh).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all critical endpoints. Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. All test data uses TEST_ prefix; cleanup via db.bookings.deleteMany({full_name:/^TEST_/}) and db.inquiries.deleteMany({name:/^TEST_/}). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL points to the preview URL — do not hardcode.
